name: boutique-checkout-consistency-audit
description: Minimal Phase 1 Online Boutique verification flow using deterministic frontend actions, service log checks, and a final LLM audit.

nodes.name: Verify cart after add
nodes.action: BASE_URL="${BOUTIQUE_FRONTEND_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:18080}"; COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/synapse-boutique-checkout-cookie.txt; if curl -fsS -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" "$BASE_URL/cart" | grep -q 'SKU #{{discover_product}}'; then echo 'cart_contains_product'; else echo 'cart_missing_product'; fi

nodes.name: Place order
Verify cart after checkout
nodes.action: BASE_URL="${BOUTIQUE_FRONTEND_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:18080}"; COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/synapse-boutique-checkout-cookie.txt; if curl -fsS -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" "$BASE_URL/cart" | grep -q 'Your shopping cart is empty!'; then echo 'cart_cleared'; else echo 'cart_not_empty'; fi

nodes.name: Fetch checkoutservice logs
nodes.action: NS="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_NAMESPACE:-default}"; CTX="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_CONTEXT:-}"; if [[ -n "$CTX" ]]; then kubectl --context "$CTX" logs -n "$NS" deployment/checkoutservice --tail=120 || true; else kubectl logs -n "$NS" deployment/checkoutservice --tail=120 || true; fi

nodes.name: Fetch paymentservice logs
nodes.action: NS="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_NAMESPACE:-default}"; CTX="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_CONTEXT:-}"; if [[ -n "$CTX" ]]; then kubectl --context "$CTX" logs -n "$NS" deployment/paymentservice --tail=120 || true; else kubectl logs -n "$NS" deployment/paymentservice --tail=120 || true; fi

nodes.name: Fetch shippingservice logs
nodes.action: NS="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_NAMESPACE:-default}"; CTX="${BOUTIQUE_KUBECTL_CONTEXT:-}"; if [[ -n "$CTX" ]]; then kubectl --context "$CTX" logs -n "$NS" deployment/shippingservice --tail=120 || true; else kubectl logs -n "$NS" deployment/shippingservice --tail=120 || true; fi

nodes.name: Audit checkout consistency

json_defaults.summary: Audit pending — insufficient evidence to determine outcome.

config.system_prompt: You are a bounded Synapse SOP audit node. You do not execute actions. You only decide whether the checkout flow reached business closure based on the provided action results and service logs. Allowed next_action values are finish and human_review. Choose finish only when checkout evidence is internally consistent. Treat cart_contains_product after add as expected. Treat cart_cleared after checkout as expected. If the cart is not empty after checkout, or if logs and page state disagree, choose human_review unless there is explicit evidence that the cart check itself is invalid.

nodes.name: Request human review
nodes.action: Review Boutique checkout audit inconsistency. Summary: {{audit.summary}}
